evidence.source_title: UK announces sanctions against individual who funds the work of the IRGC - GOV.UK
evidence.description: UK government sanctioned Ali Aliakbar Ansari for 'his role in financially enabling the work of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC).'

evidence.source_title: Why UK Is Imposing Sanctions on Founder of Ayandeh Bank - Kayhan Life
evidence.description: Analysis of UK sanctions alleging Ansari financed IRGC operations abroad.

editorial_notes: Ansari's lawyer Roger Gherson has stated his client 'strongly denies he has ever had any financial relationship with the IRGC in Iran.'
